SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement (this "SHA") is entered into among:
- Acme Holdings Pte. Ltd. (UEN 200512345A), as Founder (the "Founder");
- Globex Capital Pte. Ltd. (UEN T09LL5678B), as Investor (the "Investor"); and
- Mr Kenneth Wong (NRIC S3456789F), as Management Shareholder.

Kenneth Wong shall serve as CEO. The Investor shall receive 25% of the issued share capital
for consideration of $10 million. Confidential.
